name: Fluffly Dilled Carrots and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring 2 inches of water to boiling.
2. Add carrots and potatoes. Return to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer about 25 minutes or until very tender. Drain.
4. With an electric mixer on low speed, beat the vegetables.
5. Add milk, butter, dried dill weed, onion powder, and pepper. Beat or mash until nearly smooth.
6. If necessary, reheat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly.
